title: Add shared Zephyr public identity provider for app compatibility
description: Why this exists: project-LICHEN-9c4y.14 defines MeshCore-compatible public keys as the LICHEN Ed25519 public key, but Zephyr C currently has link_ctx-local ed25519_pk and no shared app-facing identity provider. What needs to be done: expose a safe no-private-key local-info API for self EUI/IID, self Ed25519 public key, firmware/display identity, and bounded peer public-key enumeration suitable for Meshtastic, MeshCore, Native, and CoAP adapters. Acceptance criteria: app adapters do not reach into arbitrary lichen_link_ctx globals; native_sim tests cover missing identity, self identity, peer lookup, and no private-key exposure; API composes with project-LICHEN-gbx6 shared app-interface contract.
